name: STAR WARS: Phoenix Ascending
description:
Take up the torch of a fallen legend

A long time ago in a galaxy far, far away....

Your master was once a beacon who set worlds aflame. Your master was once a Jedi, and something more than that. His hands shook the hands that shook the stars from their courses. Yet in the end, your master was overthrown, defeated, dragged down, broken, and what was left of him was exiled to the rim to live out the rest of his days in obscurity.

... which is where he found you. He raised you, trained you, honed you, made you into the instrument of his will. Now he is gone. But now you are ready. And all may burn again.

You decide what you wish to achieve:

  • Revenge: Your primary goal is to hunt down and defeat those who betrayed your master. This path is filled with direct conflict and confrontations with powerful enemies.

  • Redemption: You seek to restore your master's name and legacy, proving he was not the villain the galaxy now believes him to be. This involves uncovering secrets, forming alliances, and perhaps engaging in diplomacy.

  • Reformation: You believe your master's old ways were flawed, and your goal is to forge a new path. This might involve building your own faction, establishing a new order, or using your power to bring a chaotic galaxy to heel.

Set in the Old Republic Era of Star Wars, a time of great turmoil and opportunity. The details of what your master was like, and what he taught you are open. If you want to start with particular resources or abilities, state them in your persona or first message. Note: thanks to the parallels, sometimes the Narrator jumps to the conclusion your master was Revan and makes up its own lore about it. You can roll with that, or define it otherwise.

This one can get pretty wordy, especially if you let it bring in multiple characters to interact. Like any scenario, if your current play exceeds your context, the LLM will lose track of what is going on. You’ll have to use summarization / chat memory tricks to track key events and important characters.
creator: ZFK
